tickets.title: Unable to access company dashboard
tickets.body: User is unable to log into the YZZ HelpDesk dashboard after entering correct credentials. The issue started this morning and prevents access to important support tickets.

tickets.title: Update customer profile settings page
tickets.body: The customer profile page needs a new layout with improved user information display and easier editing options for support staff.

tickets.title: Email notifications are not working
tickets.body: Users are not receiving email notifications when their support tickets are updated. Please check the notification service and email configuration.

tickets.title: Add dark mode support
tickets.body: The support team requested a dark mode option to improve usability during night shifts and reduce eye strain.

tickets.title: Ticket search is slow
tickets.body: Searching through existing support tickets takes too long when there are many records. Database queries may need optimization.

tickets.title: Fix broken attachment uploads
tickets.body: Users cannot upload screenshots or documents when creating a new ticket. The upload button returns an unexpected error.
